lastSession.summary: Rewrote statusline from bash+jq to pure Python for cross-platform support, fixed JSON field parsing, removed jq dependency, fixed installer path resolution

backlog.description: installer/file_ops.py _copy_lib_subdir() does not prune obsolete files from ~/.claude/scripts/lib/ — could leave orphaned modules after future refactors

shipped.summary: Rewrite statusline in Python, remove jq dependency, fix cross-platform support
Split install.py (944 lines) into installer/ package with 7 focused modules
Unify notification pipeline, add run_powershell/run_quiet subprocess helpers
Pathlib migration, encoding fixes, arrow char standardization, YAML quoting
Remove orphaned PowerShell launcher scripts and clean up stale temp files
Add WSL runtime support for notifications, sound, and terminal detection
Add Codex CLI support to installer with --cli flag (claude|codex|all)
Update README for dual CLI support with comparison table
Add reasoning effort selection (low/medium/high) to /think --gpt for Codex 5.3
Add diff safety guidance to commit command to prevent errors on new files
Remove terminal focus check that suppressed toast notifications since Feb 6 refactor
Eliminate sub-agents and add verify-before-run guards across fix/push/analyze/reflect/think commands
Merge divergent local and remote branches, resolve push.md conflict
